name: Sure.jell® Strawberry Peach Jam
recipeIngredient: 4 1/4 cups prepared fruit (about 1 qt. fully ripe strawberries and 1 1/2 lb fully ripe peaches)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place jars on a rack in a large pot filled with water, bringing the water to a boil. Keep jars and lids standing in hot water until ready to fill.
2. Drain jars well before filling. Stem and crush strawberries layer by layer. Measure 2 1/4 cups into a saucepot.
3. Peel, pit, and finely chop peaches. Measure 2 cups into the strawberry mixture in the saucepot.
4. Stir in lemon juice.
5. In a separate bowl, measure sugar (scrape excess with spatula to level).
6. Stir fruit pectin into the fruit mixture in the saucepot.
7. Add butter.
8. Bring to full rolling boil on high heat, stirring constantly.
9. Quickly stir in all sugar. Return to full rolling boil and maintain for exactly 1 minute, stirring constantly.
10. Remove from heat. Skim off foam with a metal spoon.
11. Quickly ladle into prepared jars, filling to within 1/8 inch of the top.
12. Wipe jar rims and threads. Cover with two-piece lids.
13. Screw bands tightly. Invert jars for 5 minutes, then turn upright.
14. After jars are cool, check seals. Alternatively, follow the water bath method recommended by USDA.
Posted to Fabfood August 1998
